calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Darin Levioff appeared via zoom for Rebecca Guyette (trustee).
Shelia Robelllo appeared via zoom for with Amy Kost (objector).

Mr. Levioff stated that their role is to stay neutral in this matter, that Amy Kost is a stepdaughter, that the estate assets are over 3 million.
Ms. Robello stated that the trustee is to take neutral position, that she is open for mediation.

Amended Petition for Instructions is denied.

The Court will issue a Breslin Order.

Status on mediation is set for November 24, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Parties to complete mediation on or before October 27, 2025.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
